name: secret-sentinel
title: Secret Sentinel
summary: Review code or a skill bundle for credential-exfiltration patterns and least-privilege violations.
description: A security-review reasoning skill: it teaches the agent to recognize secret-access-correlated-with-egress, over-broad capabilities, and capability drift. Because it necessarily NAMES sensitive indicators (credential file paths), it ships a curator-acknowledged scanner waiver -- an accountable exception, recorded in the transparency log.
author: Warden Curated Pack

task.description: The code or skill bundle to review for secret-handling risk.

scan_allow.reason: This is a security-review skill; its instructions intentionally enumerate sensitive credential-file indicators (e.g. cloud credential and SSH key paths) as patterns to RECOGNIZE. It declares and uses no capabilities itself; the references are documentation, not behavior. Curator-acknowledged.
